EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IPushbroomXform

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a Pushbroom transform.

[Guid("2145493D-C675-470E-8577-1F5D52170F55")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IPushbroomXform : IGeodataXform
